mission.text: Get a clear overview of your energy consumption and start managing your costs smarter. The application allows you to track electricity, gas, water, and other utilities, displays them in clear charts, and lets you compare individual months or years. You will instantly see trends, seasonal fluctuations, and unusual changes. Thanks to this, you can better plan expenses, prevent unpleasant surprises in your billing, and gradually optimize your consumption.

howItWorks.subtitle: Easy start
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Get an overview of your consumption in three simple steps. From registration to your first savings analysis.

step1.title: Register
step1.description: Create an account and get access to the application.

step2.title: Add supply points
step2.description: Enter your homes or spaces where you want to track consumption.

step3.title: Track consumption
step3.description: View charts and statistics for better cost control.

charts.title: Charts and Statistics
charts.description: Visualize your monthly, and yearly consumption in clear interactive charts that help you identify inefficiencies.

costs.title: Cost Tracking
costs.description: Keep a constant overview of your expenses for electricity, gas, and water. The app automatically calculates estimated costs.

properties.title: Multiple Properties
properties.description: Track consumption in your apartment, cottage, and office under one account with easy switching between them.

reports.title: Detailed Reports
reports.description: Generate automatic monthly and yearly overviews. Export data to Excel or PDF for further analysis or authorities.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Stay in the loop with alerts about unusual consumption spikes or approaching meter reading deadlines.

history.title: Unified History
history.description: Keep all your meter readings securely stored and available at any time. Easily return to past periods and compare consumption trends.

pricing.title: Plans for every household
pricing.description: Choose the level of control you need for your energy.

card.defaultDescription: Everything you need to start your journey to savings.
